title: March Madness Riddle
description: Four riddles, one legendary moment. Guess the two teams, the event name, and the year.

riddles.team1: This pack of dogs from the Northeast bit their way through the bracket as a massive underdog.
riddles.team2: These Cavaliers were the top overall seed and had never lost to a 16 before this night.
riddles.event: The name of this event shares its title with something that happens when favorites fall and brackets shatter.
riddles.year: This happened the same year the Eagles won their first Super Bowl and Black Panther hit theaters.

riddles.team1: This Blue Devil hit a turnaround jumper at the buzzer, cementing his name in tournament lore.
riddles.team2: These Wildcats from the Bluegrass State were on the wrong end of one of the greatest shots ever.
riddles.event: This play is named for a shot that beats the clock — when the buzzer sounds and the ball still goes in.
riddles.year: This happened during a year when the Barcelona Olympics showcased the original Dream Team.

riddles.team1: These Wildcats from the desert ran a perfect regular season but couldn't finish the job in April.
riddles.team2: This program from the land of crab cakes and Old Bay pulled off the biggest upset of that tournament.
riddles.event: This event is named for what happens when one team completes every game without a loss — until they don't.
riddles.year: The same year Frozen came out and the Seahawks won the Super Bowl in a blowout.

riddles.team1: This Jesuit school from Philadelphia became the lowest seed to ever reach the Final Four.
riddles.team2: These top-seeded Jayhawks were supposed to cruise but got ambushed by a team nobody picked.
riddles.event: This is what they call a small, overlooked team that goes on a magical run — like a fairy tale character at the ball.
riddles.year: This was the year Obama was inaugurated for his second term and Harlem Shake went viral.

riddles.team1: Coach Jim Valvano ran around the court looking for someone to hug after this team's miracle win.
riddles.team2: These Cougars from Houston were called Phi Slama Jama for their high-flying dunks.
riddles.event: This championship game ended on a last-second shot that spawned one of sports' most iconic celebrations.
riddles.year: Return of the Jedi premiered and the internet was still a decade away for most people.
